BasicGraphBuilderService.cc
1 #include "BasicGraphBuilderService.h"
2 /* Author : dipietrd at Mon Dec 10 15:04:54 2007
3  * Generated by createNew
4  */
5 
6 #include "arcane/IParallelMng.h"
7 #include "arcane/IGraph.h"
8 
9 using namespace Arcane;
10 
11 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
12 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
13 
14 IGraphBuilder::NodeDescriptor BasicGraphBuilderService::addNode(const Item& I) {
15  if(m_state != IGraphBuilder::ADDNODES_STATE)
16  error() << "State is inconsistent with a call to BasicGraphBuilderService::addNode";
17 
18  if(I.isCell())
19  m_dual_cell_uid[I] = m_current_node_local_uid++;
20  else if(I.isFace())
21  m_dual_face_uid[I] = m_current_node_local_uid++;
22  else
23  fatal() << "Cannot add this type of dual node";
24 }
25 
26 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
27 
28 void BasicGraphBuilderService::endAddNodes() {
29  if(m_state != IGraphBuilder::ADDNODES_STATE)
30  error() << "State is inconsistent with a call to BasicGraphBuilderService::endAddNodes";
31 
32  Integer nb_dual_cells = m_dual_cell_uid.size();
33  Integer nb_dual_faces = m_dual_face_uid.size();
34  info() << "Adding " << nb_dual_cells << " dual cells";
35  info() << "Adding " << nb_dual_faces << " dual faces";
36 
37  // Compute current domain's node global unique id base
38  IParallelMng* parallel_mng = subDomain()->parallelMng();
39  SharedArray<Int64> current_node_local_uid(1);
40  current_node_local_uid[0] = m_current_node_local_uid;
41  SharedArray<Int64> all_current_local_uid(parallel_mng->commSize());
42  parallel_mng->allGather(current_node_local_uid, all_current_local_uid);
43  for(Integer i = 0; i < subDomain()->subDomainId(); i++)
44  m_node_global_uid_base += all_current_local_uid[i];
45 
46  // Add dual cells
47  SharedArray<Int64> dual_cell_node_id(nb_dual_cells);
48  SharedArray<Int64> dual_cell_item_id(nb_dual_cells);
49  Integer info_index = 0;
50 
51  for(Item2IntMap::iterator i = m_dual_cell_uid.begin(); i != m_dual_cell_uid.end(); i++) {
52  const Cell& T = i->first.toCell();
53  Integer T_uid = m_node_global_uid_base + m_dual_cell_uid[T];
54 
55  dual_cell_node_id[info_index] = T_uid;
56  dual_cell_item_id[info_index] = T.uniqueId();
57 
58  info_index++;
59  }
60 
61  // Add dual faces
62  SharedArray<Int64> dual_face_node_id(nb_dual_faces);
63  SharedArray<Int64> dual_face_item_id(nb_dual_faces);
64  info_index = 0;
65 
66  for(Item2IntMap::iterator i = m_dual_face_uid.begin(); i != m_dual_face_uid.end(); i++) {
67  const Face& F = i->first.toFace();
68  Integer F_uid = m_node_global_uid_base + m_dual_face_uid[F];
69 
70  dual_face_node_id[info_index] = F_uid;
71  dual_face_item_id[info_index] = F.uniqueId();
72 
73  info_index++;
74  }
75 
76  // Add dual nodes to default graph
77  m_graph->addDualNodes(IT_DualCell, nb_dual_cells, dual_cell_node_id, dual_cell_item_id);
78  m_graph->addDualNodes(IT_DualFace, nb_dual_faces, dual_face_node_id, dual_face_item_id);
79 
80  // Change the state of the service: after this point it will not be possible
81  // to add new nodes
82  m_state = IGraphBuilder::ADDLINKS_STATE;
83 }
84 
85 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
86 
87 void BasicGraphBuilderService::addLink(const Item& I1, const Item& I2) {
88  if(m_state != IGraphBuilder::ADDLINKS_STATE)
89  error() << "State is inconsistent with a call to BasicGraphBuilderService::addLink";
90 
91  Integer uid_I1, uid_I2;
92  if(I1.isCell())
93  uid_I1 = m_node_global_uid_base + m_dual_cell_uid[I1];
94  else if(I1.isFace())
95  uid_I1 = m_node_global_uid_base + m_dual_face_uid[I1];
96  else
97  error() << "Unhandled item type required while adding link";
98 
99  if(I2.isCell())
100  uid_I2 = m_node_global_uid_base + m_dual_cell_uid[I2];
101  else if(I2.isFace())
102  uid_I2 = m_node_global_uid_base + m_dual_face_uid[I2];
103  else
104  error() << "Unhandled item type required while adding link";
105 
106  m_links.push_back(LinkDescriptor(uid_I1, uid_I2));
107 }
108 
109 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
110 
111 void BasicGraphBuilderService::endAddLinks() {
112  if(m_state != IGraphBuilder::ADDLINKS_STATE)
113  error() << "State is inconsistent with a call to BasicGraphBuilderService::endAddLinks";
114 
115  // Add links
116  Integer nb_links = m_links.size();
117  SharedArray<Int64> link_info(1+4*nb_links);
118  link_info[0] = 0; // New format
119  Integer info_index = 0;
120 
121  m_current_link_local_uid = 0;
122  for(LinkDescriptorList::iterator i = m_links.begin(); i != m_links.end(); i++) {
123  link_info[info_index++] = IT_Line2; // Link with 2 dual nodes
124  link_info[info_index++] = m_current_link_local_uid++;
125  link_info[info_index++] = i->uid_I1;
126  link_info[info_index++] = i->uid_I2;
127  }
128  m_graph->addLinks(nb_links , link_info);
129 
130  // Aggiungere la creazione della variabile sui dual node contenente il tipo
131  // del link
132 
133  m_state = IGraphBuilder::FINALIZED_STATE;
134 }
135 
136 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
137 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
138 
139 ARCANE_REGISTER_SERVICE_BASICGRAPHBUILDER(BasicGraphBuilder,BasicGraphBuilderService);
